context: Evaluates correct implementation of MQL #include directive parsing. The candidate must extract file paths from both angle-bracket and double-quote include styles while correctly handling block comments and single-line comments.

checklist.name: Angle-bracket includes
checklist.description: Correctly extracts paths from #include <file.mqh> style directives, returning just the path without the angle brackets

checklist.name: Double-quote includes
checklist.description: Correctly extracts paths from #include "file.mqh" style directives, returning just the path without the quotes

checklist.name: Block comment stripping
checklist.description: Block comments (/* ... */) are stripped before scanning, so #include directives inside block comments are not returned

checklist.name: Single-line comment skipping
checklist.description: Lines beginning with // are skipped; #include directives on such lines are not extracted

checklist.name: Mixed source correctness
checklist.description: When source contains a mix of valid includes, commented includes, and non-include lines, only valid #include paths are returned with no duplicates or spurious entries
